step_rationale: Decreased plasmalogen phosphatidylethanolamine predicts post-MI mortality; myocardial oxidative damage marker.
mechanism: Decreased plasmalogen PE (20:0/18:0) content post-MI reflects oxidative stress-induced myocardial membrane degradation.

references.title: Lipidomic analyses reveal potential biomarkers for predicting death and heart failure after acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry
